# Cleveland Truck Parking

> Cleveland Truck Parking offers secure, affordable parking for semi-trucks, tractor trailers, box trucks, and commercial vehicles at 799 E 73rd St in Cleveland, OH. We serve owner-operators, fleet managers, and local delivery drivers with 24/7 access, round-the-clock surveillance, and flexible month-to-month leases.

## Homepage

Trusted Parking Solutions in Cuyahoga County

### Secure Truck Parking in Cleveland, OH

Whether you need parking for your semi-truck, tractor trailer, or box truck, Cleveland Truck Parking offers 24/7 access, round-the-clock surveillance, wide lanes, and flexible month-to-month leases at competitive rates. Conveniently located near major freight corridors.

**Address:** 799 E 73rd St, Cleveland, OH 44103
**Phone:** (216) 600-1656

### Why Choose Us -- The Cleveland Truck Parking Difference

We're committed to providing the best parking experience with top-notch facilities and exceptional customer service.

- **24/7 Security** -- State-of-the-art security systems with surveillance cameras and controlled access for your peace of mind.
- **Convenient Access** -- 24/7 gated access so you can arrive and depart on your schedule, day or night.
- **Wide Lanes** -- Our lot features wide, paved lanes designed for easy maneuvering -- even with a fully loaded 53' trailer.
- **Highway Access** -- Minutes from I-90, I-77, and I-480 -- quick access to Cleveland's major freight corridors and distribution hubs.
- **Flexible Rentals** -- Month-to-month leases with no long-term commitment required. Pay only for what you need.
- **Prime Location** -- Conveniently located in Cleveland, OH with easy access from major roads and highways.

### Our Parking Services

- **Truck Parking** -- Professional truck parking solutions in Cleveland, OH.
- **Semi-Truck Parking** -- Professional semi-truck parking solutions in Cleveland, OH.
- **Box Truck Parking** -- Professional box truck parking solutions in Cleveland, OH.
- **Tractor Trailer Parking** -- Professional tractor trailer parking solutions in Cleveland, OH.

### Areas We Serve

Cleveland, Brooklyn, Lakewood, Parma, and Euclid -- all in Cuyahoga County, OH.

### Visit Our Facility

- **Address:** 799 E 73rd St, Cleveland, OH 44103
- **Phone:** (216) 600-1656
- **Email:** parking@clevelandtruckparking.com
- **Hours:** 24/7 Access

## About Cleveland Truck Parking

Providing quality truck parking solutions in Cuyahoga County since our founding.

### Your Trusted Truck Parking Partner in Cleveland

Cleveland Truck Parking offers secure, affordable parking for semi-trucks, tractor trailers, box trucks, and commercial vehicles. Located at 799 E 73rd St in Cleveland, OH with 24/7 access, round-the-clock surveillance, and flexible month-to-month leases.

At Cleveland Truck Parking, we understand that your truck is your livelihood. That's why we've designed our facility with your peace of mind as our top priority -- so you can focus on the road, not worrying about where to park.

Whether you're an owner-operator, fleet manager, or local delivery driver, our team is here to help you find the perfect parking solution for your commercial vehicles.

### What Sets Us Apart

- **Security First** -- State-of-the-art security systems with 24/7 video surveillance, secure access codes, and well-lit premises ensure your vehicle are always protected.
- **Customer Focused** -- Our friendly team is dedicated to helping you find the right parking solution. We take the time to understand your fleet needs and provide personalized service.
- **Quality Facilities** -- A well-maintained, paved facility with two spot sizes designed for commercial trucks. Wide lanes for easy maneuvering and year-round surface maintenance.

### Conveniently Located in Cleveland

Easy access from major roads makes it simple to get to your parking spot when you need it.

- **Address:** 799 E 73rd St, Cleveland, OH 44103
- **Phone:** (216) 600-1656
- **Email:** parking@clevelandtruckparking.com
- **Hours:** 24/7 Access

---

## Truck Parking

Secure, affordable commercial truck parking in Cleveland, OH -- 24/7 access near major freight corridors.

### Commercial Truck Parking in Cleveland

Cleveland Truck Parking is your reliable partner for secure commercial vehicle parking in Greater Cleveland. Located at 799 E 73rd St, our facility offers convenient access to I-90, I-77, and I-480 -- putting you minutes from Cleveland's busiest freight corridors, distribution centers, and logistics hubs.

Whether you're an owner-operator looking for a safe overnight spot, a fleet manager needing monthly parking for multiple vehicles, or a local delivery driver who needs a home base, we have flexible parking solutions designed for the demands of commercial trucking.

Our facility features wide lanes designed for easy maneuvering of large vehicles, 24/7 gated access, round-the-clock video surveillance, bright LED lighting, and a paved surface maintained year-round. We offer competitive month-to-month leases with no long-term contracts required.

### Features & Benefits

- 24/7 Gated Access -- come and go on your schedule
- Round-the-Clock Video Surveillance with recorded footage
- Wide, Paved Lanes -- easy maneuvering for full-size rigs
- Well-Lit Grounds with LED security lighting
- Flexible Month-to-Month Leases -- no long-term contracts
- Convenient Highway Access -- minutes from I-90, I-77, I-480
- On-Site Management for questions and support
- Competitive Monthly Rates for all vehicle sizes

### Who Parks With Us?

- Owner-Operators & Independent Truckers
- Fleet Managers & Logistics Companies
- Local Delivery & Courier Services
- Construction & Utility Contractors
- Moving Companies & Haulers
- Food & Beverage Distributors

---

## Semi-Truck Parking

Dedicated 12'x70' parking spots for Class 8 semi-trucks and 18-wheelers in Cleveland, OH.

### Semi-Truck Parking -- Built for Full-Size Rigs

Finding safe, reliable parking for your semi-truck shouldn't be a daily struggle. At Cleveland Truck Parking, our 12'x70' parking spots (840 sq ft) are specifically designed for full-size Class 8 semi-trucks, 18-wheelers, and over-the-road tractor trailers.

Located near the intersection of I-90 and I-77, our facility is ideally positioned for long-haul drivers running routes through the Great Lakes region, as well as regional carriers serving Northeast Ohio's distribution network. Park your rig securely while you rest, handle paperwork, or wait for your next dispatch.

We understand the realities of life on the road. That's why we offer 24/7 gated access so you can arrive and depart on your schedule -- no waiting for office hours. Our wide, paved lanes are designed for easy entry, exit, and backing maneuvers with a fully loaded trailer.

With HOS (Hours of Service) compliance top of mind, having a guaranteed, secure parking spot eliminates the stress of circling truck stops looking for availability. Reserve your monthly spot and know it's waiting for you every time.

### Features & Benefits

- 12'x70' Dedicated Spots (840 sq ft) -- fits full-size 53' trailers
- 24/7 Gated Access -- arrive and depart on your schedule
- Wide Turning Lanes -- easy maneuvering for 18-wheelers
- Round-the-Clock Video Surveillance with recorded footage
- Well-Lit, Paved Surface -- maintained year-round
- No Long-Term Contracts -- flexible month-to-month leases
- Near I-90, I-77, I-480 -- minutes from major freight routes
- HOS-Friendly -- guaranteed spot for compliant rest stops

### Spot Specifications

- **Spot Dimensions:** 12' x 70'
- **Total Area:** 840 sq ft
- **Accommodates:** Tractor trailers, semi-trucks, full-size 53' trailers, over-the-road vehicles, sleeper cabs

---

## Box Truck Parking

Affordable 9'x25' parking spots for box trucks, delivery trucks, and reefer trucks in Cleveland, OH.

### Box Truck Parking -- Perfect for Delivery & Medium-Duty Vehicles

Need a secure spot for your box truck, delivery van, or reefer truck? Cleveland Truck Parking offers dedicated 9'x25' parking spots (225 sq ft) designed specifically for medium-duty commercial vehicles.

Whether you're running a local delivery route, managing a catering fleet, or operating a moving company, our box truck spots give you a reliable home base for your vehicles. Located near I-90 and I-77, you'll have quick access to every corner of Greater Cleveland and the surrounding suburbs.

Our facility is built for commercial vehicles -- not a converted residential lot. The paved surface, proper drainage, and wide access lanes mean you can pull in and out without hassle, even during peak hours. 24/7 gated access means your early-morning delivery routes and late-night returns are never a problem.

With competitive monthly rates and no long-term contracts, you get the flexibility your business needs. Scale up or down as your fleet changes -- we'll work with you.

### Features & Benefits

- 9'x25' Dedicated Spots (225 sq ft) -- sized for medium-duty trucks
- 24/7 Gated Access -- perfect for early-morning and late-night schedules
- Paved Surface with Proper Drainage -- no mud, no puddles
- Round-the-Clock Video Surveillance for vehicle security
- Well-Lit Grounds -- safe access at any hour
- Month-to-Month Leases -- scale with your business needs
- Easy Highway Access -- minutes from I-90, I-77, I-480
- Affordable Monthly Rates -- competitive pricing for Cleveland

### Vehicles That Fit Our Box Truck Spots

- Box Trucks (14'-26')
- Delivery Trucks & Sprinter Vans
- Reefer Trucks & Refrigerated Vans
- Enclosed Trailers
- Dump Trailers & Utility Trailers
- Light-Duty Commercial Vehicles

### Spot Specifications

- **Spot Dimensions:** 9' x 25'
- **Total Area:** 225 sq ft

---

## Tractor Trailer Parking

Professional 12'x70' parking for tractor trailers, 18-wheelers, and over-the-road vehicles in Cleveland, OH.

### Tractor Trailer Parking -- Full-Size Spots for the Biggest Rigs

Tractor trailers require serious space, and that's exactly what Cleveland Truck Parking delivers. Our 12'x70' parking spots (840 sq ft) are purpose-built for full-size tractor trailers, 18-wheelers, and over-the-road combination vehicles.

The FMCSA estimates that truck drivers spend an average of 56 minutes per day looking for parking. With a reserved monthly spot at Cleveland Truck Parking, that problem disappears. Your spot is waiting for you -- guaranteed -- whether you roll in at 2 PM or 2 AM.

Our facility sits at the crossroads of Cleveland's major interstates: I-90 (east-west), I-77 (north-south), and I-480 (outer belt). This makes us an ideal staging point for drivers serving the Greater Cleveland metro area, Akron-Canton corridor, and the Lake Erie port region.

Safety is our top priority. Every inch of our facility is covered by 24/7 video surveillance, and our well-lit, paved grounds are designed to minimize blind spots. Wide lanes allow for safe entry and exit without the tight squeezes you'll find at overcrowded truck stops.

We work with owner-operators, fleet managers, and logistics coordinators to provide flexible parking that fits your operation -- not the other way around.

### Features & Benefits

- 12'x70' Full-Size Spots (840 sq ft) -- fits 53' trailers with tractor
- 24/7 Gated Access -- no office hours, no lockouts
- Wide Entry/Exit Lanes -- designed for combination vehicles
- Full Video Surveillance Coverage -- 24/7 recorded monitoring
- Paved, Well-Lit Surface -- safe maneuvering day and night
- Month-to-Month Flexibility -- no annual contracts required
- Strategic Location -- near I-90, I-77, I-480 interchange
- Fleet-Friendly -- multi-vehicle rates available

### Why Choose Dedicated Parking Over Truck Stops?

- **Guaranteed Availability** -- No more circling crowded lots. Your reserved spot is always waiting.
- **Lower Monthly Cost** -- Nightly truck stop fees add up fast. Our monthly rate saves you money.
- **Better Security** -- Dedicated surveillance and gated access vs. open truck stop lots.
- **HOS Compliance** -- Plan your rest stops with confidence knowing your spot is secured.
- **No Idle Time** -- Direct highway access means less time navigating surface streets.

---

## Parking Spot Size Guide

Find the right parking spot for your commercial vehicle. We offer two sizes designed for box trucks and tractor trailers.

### Available Parking Spot Sizes

Not sure what size you need? Use our guide below or call us at (216) 600-1656 for personalized recommendations.

#### Box Truck Spot -- 9'x25'

- **Size:** 9' x 25' (225 sq ft)
- **Category:** Medium-Duty Commercial Vehicles
- **Vehicles that fit:** Box Trucks (14'-26'), Delivery Trucks, Reefer Trucks, Sprinter Vans, Enclosed Trailers, Dump Trailers, Light Trailers

#### Tractor Trailer / Semi-Truck Spot -- 12'x70'

- **Size:** 12' x 70' (840 sq ft)
- **Category:** Full-Size Over-the-Road Vehicles
- **Vehicles that fit:** Tractor Trailers, Semi-Trucks (Class 8), 18-Wheelers, Full-Size 53' Trailers, Sleeper Cabs, Over-the-Road Vehicles

### How to Choose the Right Size

- **Know Your Vehicle Size** -- Know your vehicle dimensions -- length, width, and height. This ensures you pick a spot that fits with room to maneuver.
- **Go Bigger If in Doubt** -- If your truck is close to the max for a 9x25 spot, go with the 12x70. The extra space makes parking and pulling out much easier.
- **Ask Our Team** -- Not sure which size fits your truck? Call us at (216) 600-1656 and our team will help you find the right spot.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about our truck parking and services.

**Q: What size parking spots do you offer?**
A: We offer two spot sizes: 9'x25' (225 sq ft) for box trucks, delivery trucks, reefer trucks, and enclosed trailers; and 12'x70' (840 sq ft) for semi-trucks, tractor trailers, 18-wheelers, and full-size over-the-road vehicles. Visit our size guide or call (216) 600-1656 for help choosing.

**Q: What are your access hours?**
A: Cleveland Truck Parking offers 24/7 gated access. You can arrive and depart on your own schedule, day or night -- no waiting for office hours.

**Q: Is my truck safe at your facility?**
A: Absolutely. Our facility features round-the-clock video surveillance with recorded footage, gated access, bright LED security lighting, and a well-maintained paved surface. Your vehicle is monitored 24/7.

**Q: Do you require a long-term contract?**
A: No. We offer flexible month-to-month leases with no long-term commitment required. You can scale up or down as your fleet needs change.

**Q: How do I reserve a parking spot?**
A: Reserving is easy. Call us at (216) 600-1656 or visit our facility at 799 E 73rd St, Cleveland, OH 44103. We offer flexible month-to-month leases that start as soon as you're ready.

**Q: Where are you located?**
A: We're at 799 E 73rd St, Cleveland, OH 44103 -- minutes from I-90, I-77, and I-480. Our central location provides quick access to Cleveland's major freight corridors and distribution centers.

**Q: Do you offer fleet or multi-vehicle rates?**
A: Yes. If you're a fleet manager or company parking 3 or more trucks, contact us about our multi-vehicle rates. Call (216) 600-1656 to discuss fleet parking options.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and electronic payments for your convenience. Auto-pay is also available so you never miss a payment.

---

## Truck Parking Near Cleveland, OH

Convenient, secure truck parking just minutes from Cleveland.

### Parking Solutions for Cleveland Residents

Cleveland Truck Parking is proud to serve residents of Cleveland, OH. Our facility at 799 E 73rd St, in Cleveland offers easy access and a range of parking options for Cleveland residents. Whether you need short-term parking between loads or a long-term monthly spot, we have the right parking space for your truck.

- Truck Parking
- Semi-Truck Parking
- Box Truck Parking
- Tractor Trailer Parking
